question: Based on the stacked area chart showing quarterly restaurant performance indicators, which statement is most appropriate?

options.A: Q1 has the best overall performance because it has the lowest customer complaints and kitchen temperature.
options.B: Q4 has the best overall performance because it reaches the highest combined level of all indicators.
options.C: Q2 has the best overall performance because all indicators are closest together in value.
options.D: The chart cannot determine overall performance because it combines restaurant metrics with different units and meanings.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Sales, Kitchen Temperature, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
